title: grab
description: grabs the output of another object

messages.description: a message to send an object whose output is grabbed
anything that was grabbed from another object
the message sent to an object whose output is grabbed

arguments.description: number of outlets besides the rightmost one
messages in the inlet are sent to receive objects named by this symbol

methods.description: sets the receive name (if a 2nd argument was given)

body: [grab] sends a message to another object and "grabs" its output, sending it through its outlet(s) instead of the grabbed object.
